attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
 BATCH_ID                      
,STAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
,STAID.AMOUNT                        
,STAID.INVOICE_BATCH_ID              
,STAID.CANCELLATION_FLAG             
,STAID.CREATED_BY                    
,STAID.CREATION_DATE                 
,STAID.DESCRIPTION                   
,STAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
,STAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER      
,STAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID       
,STAID.INVOICE_ID                    
,STAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE        
,STAID.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STAID.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
,STAID.ORG_ID                        
,STAID.PERIOD_NAME                   
,STAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
,STAID.POSTED_FLAG                   
,STAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
,STAID.QUANTITY_VARIANCE             
,STAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,STAID.UNIT_PRICE                    
,STAID.WEB_PARAMETER_ID              
,STAID.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STAID.GLOBAL_NAME             
,STAID.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STAID.ACTION_CODE                    
,'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE      
,STAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER   
,STAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE6                    
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE3              
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE5               
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE4             
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE8               
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE7        
FROM
	   (
	   SELECT 
		 SMAID.BATCH_ID      
		,CAST(SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) AS  ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT                
		,SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
		,SMAID.AMOUNT                        
		,SMAID.INVOICE_BATCH_ID              
		,SMAID.CANCELLATION_FLAG             
		,SMAID.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMAID.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMAID.DESCRIPTION                   
		,SMAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SMAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER      
		,SMAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID       
		,SMAID.INVOICE_ID                    
		,SMAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE        
		,SMAID.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMAID.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
		,SMAID.ORG_ID                        
		,SMAID.PERIOD_NAME    
		,SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID               
		,COALESCE(SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD           
		,SMAID.POSTED_FLAG                   
		,SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
		,SMAID.QUANTITY_VARIANCE             
		,SMAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,SMAID.UNIT_PRICE                    
		,SMAID.WEB_PARAMETER_ID              
		,SMAID.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMAID.GLOBAL_NAME   
        		,SMAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER		
		,SMAID.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMAID.ACTION_CODE  
           		 ,SMAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE 
,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE6                    
,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE3              
,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE5               
,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE4             
,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE8               
,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE7 
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL SMAID WHERE SMAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	)STAID
WHERE 
	( 
	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLDB.N_VENDOR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE NVIDTT
		WHERE NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD = STAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE )
	OR	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			     WHERE      NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STAID.GLOBAL_NAME
				    AND NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STAID.INVOICE_ID
				    AND NVI.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
				 WHERE	    STAID.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
					AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
					AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
					AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
					AND NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
					AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
				WHERE STAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT BETWEEN  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT NPOSDI.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NPOSDI.SS_CD 
				      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPOSDI,
					   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
				      WHERE NPOSDI.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY =NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
				     )NPOSD
				   ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC   
				WHERE   NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
					AND NPOSD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
    OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL EAILA
                    WHERE NVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STAID.INVOICE_ID
							AND NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT=STAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER
							AND STAID.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
							AND NVIL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
							AND NVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT = EAILA.INVOICE_ID
       AND NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT =  EAILA.LINE_NUMBER
       AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=EAILA.GLOBAL_NAME)					
)
UNION ALL
/* SELECT  
 BATCH_ID                      
,STAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
,STAID.AMOUNT                        
,STAID.INVOICE_BATCH_ID              
,STAID.CANCELLATION_FLAG             
,STAID.CREATED_BY                    
,STAID.CREATION_DATE                 
,STAID.DESCRIPTION                   
,STAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
,STAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER      
,STAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID       
,STAID.INVOICE_ID                    
,STAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE        
,STAID.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STAID.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
,STAID.ORG_ID                        
,STAID.PERIOD_NAME                   
,STAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
,STAID.POSTED_FLAG                   
,STAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
,STAID.QUANTITY_VARIANCE             
,STAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,STAID.UNIT_PRICE                    
,STAID.WEB_PARAMETER_ID              
,STAID.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STAID.GLOBAL_NAME 
,STAID.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STAID.ACTION_CODE                    
,'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE  
,STAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER 
,STAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE               
FROM
	   (
	   SELECT 
		 SMAID.BATCH_ID      
		,CAST(SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) AS  ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT                
		,SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
		,SMAID.AMOUNT                        
		,SMAID.INVOICE_BATCH_ID              
		,SMAID.CANCELLATION_FLAG             
		,SMAID.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMAID.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMAID.DESCRIPTION                   
		,SMAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SMAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER      
		,SMAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID       
		,SMAID.INVOICE_ID                    
		,SMAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE        
		,SMAID.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMAID.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
		,SMAID.ORG_ID                        
		,SMAID.PERIOD_NAME    
		,SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID               
		,COALESCE(SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD           
		,SMAID.POSTED_FLAG                   
		,SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
		,SMAID.QUANTITY_VARIANCE             
		,SMAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,SMAID.UNIT_PRICE                    
		,SMAID.WEB_PARAMETER_ID              
		,SMAID.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMAID.GLOBAL_NAME   
                ,SMAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER		
		,SMAID.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMAID.ACTION_CODE  
                ,SMAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE  
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL SMAID WHERE SMAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	)STAID
WHERE 
	(  
	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLDB.N_VENDOR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE NVIDTT
		WHERE NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD = STAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE )
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			     WHERE      NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STAID.GLOBAL_NAME
				    AND NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STAID.INVOICE_ID
				    AND NVI.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
				 WHERE	    STAID.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
					AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
					AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
					AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
					AND NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
					AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
				WHERE STAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT BETWEEN  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT NPOSDI.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NPOSDI.SS_CD 
				      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPOSDI,
					   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
				      WHERE NPOSDI.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY =NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
				     )NPOSD
				   ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC   
				WHERE   NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
					AND NPOSD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
    	
) 
UNION ALL */
SELECT  
 BATCH_ID                      
,STAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
,STAID.AMOUNT                        
,STAID.INVOICE_BATCH_ID              
,STAID.CANCELLATION_FLAG             
,STAID.CREATED_BY                    
,STAID.CREATION_DATE                 
,STAID.DESCRIPTION                   
,STAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
,STAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER      
,STAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID       
,STAID.INVOICE_ID                    
,STAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE        
,STAID.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STAID.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
,STAID.ORG_ID                        
,STAID.PERIOD_NAME                   
,STAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
,STAID.POSTED_FLAG                   
,STAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
,STAID.QUANTITY_VARIANCE             
,STAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,STAID.UNIT_PRICE                    
,STAID.WEB_PARAMETER_ID              
,STAID.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STAID.GLOBAL_NAME    
,STAID.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STAID.ACTION_CODE                    
,'LV'EXCEPTION_TYPE  
,STAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER   
,STAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE6                    
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE3              
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE5               
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE4             
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE8               
,STAID.ATTRIBUTE7                
FROM			
	(SELECT 
		 SMAID.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE               
		,SMAID.AMOUNT                        
		,SMAID.INVOICE_BATCH_ID              
		,SMAID.CANCELLATION_FLAG             
		,SMAID.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMAID.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMAID.DESCRIPTION                   
		,SMAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
		,SMAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER      
		,SMAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID       
		,SMAID.INVOICE_ID                    
		,SMAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE        
		,SMAID.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMAID.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
		,SMAID.ORG_ID                        
		,SMAID.PERIOD_NAME   
		,SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID                
		,SMAID.POSTED_FLAG                   
		,SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
		,SMAID.QUANTITY_VARIANCE             
		,SMAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,SMAID.UNIT_PRICE                    
		,SMAID.WEB_PARAMETER_ID              
		,SMAID.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMAID.GLOBAL_NAME   
        ,SMAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER 		
		,SMAID.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMAID.ACTION_CODE  
		,'LV'EXCEPTION_TYPE
        ,SMAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE 
		,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE6                    
		,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE3              
		,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE5               
		,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE4             
		,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE8               
		,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE7  
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL SMAID WHERE SMAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y'
	AND  SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED  > 99999999999.9999999 
)STAID

SELECT  RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID,SMOAID.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
			SMOAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SMOAID.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM (SELECT STAIND.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
      FROM (SELECT INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME 
             FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL WHERE POSTED_FLAG='Y'
			 UNION ALL
			 SELECT INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME 
             FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUT  WHERE POSTED_FLAG='Y'
            ) STAIND,
           $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
      WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STAIND.GLOBAL_NAME
     ) SMOAID, 
     (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
       FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION) SMVIB
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1
		FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION SVID
		WHERE SVID.SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = SMOAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
		AND SVID.SS_CD = SMOAID.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
SMVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY   
,STEXAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER AS BK_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_NUM_INT   
,NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM         
,NVI.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY AS AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY           
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,STEXAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_ACCT_DT      
,NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_TRX_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN STEXAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED>99999999999.9999999  THEN 1
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) END AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INVOICED_QTY   
,COALESCE(STEXAID.UNIT_PRICE,0) AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_UNIT_PRC_AMT 
,COALESCE(STEXAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE,0) AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INV_VRC_AMT  
,NPOSD.PO_TYPE_CD AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_DOC_TYPE_CD  
,COALESCE(STEXAID.POSTED_FLAG,'=') AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_POSTED_FLG   
,STEXAID.DESCRIPTION AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_DESCR   
,COALESCE(STEXAID.AMOUNT,0)  AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
,'CASH_PAYMENT' AS EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT_TYPE_CD 
,NPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY       
,NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY  AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY         
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       
,COALESCE(NERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY ,-999) AS  EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY      
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,'FISCAL YEAR' AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
,STEXAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD                         
,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS DD_BK_COMPANY_CD              
,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD           
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE  AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD 
,STEXAID.ACTION_CODE     
,NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY 
,COALESCE(NIUM.BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD
,COALESCE (STEXAID.ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_INTER_CMPNY_FNCL_ACCT_CD
,COALESCE (STEXAID.ATTRIBUTE3,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_INTER_CMPNY_CMPNY_CD
,COALESCE (STEXAID.ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_INTER_CMPNY_DEPT_CD 
,COALESCE (STEXAID.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_INTER_CMPNY_FNCL_LOC_CD 
,COALESCE (STEXAID.ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_INTER_CMPNY_PRJT_CD 
,COALESCE (STEXAID.ATTRIBUTE7,'UNKNOWN') AS DD_INTER_CMPNY_SUBACCT_CD 
FROM 
   (
   	SELECT 
			 SMAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
			,SMAID.GLOBAL_NAME
			,SMAID.INVOICE_ID
			,SMAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
			,SMAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER
			,SMAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			,CAST(SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT
			,COALESCE(SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, -999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
			,SMAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,SMAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED
			,SMAID.UNIT_PRICE
			,SMAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
			,SMAID.POSTED_FLAG
			,SMAID.DESCRIPTION
			,SMAID.AMOUNT
            ,SMAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE 
			,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE6 
			,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE3 
			,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE5 
			,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE4 
			,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE8 
			,SMAID.ATTRIBUTE7 
			,SMAID.ACTION_CODE
			,CREATE_DATETIME 
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL SMAID WHERE SMAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
			 EAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
			,EAID.GLOBAL_NAME
			,EAID.INVOICE_ID
			,EAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
			,EAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER			
			,EAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			,CAST(EAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT
			,COALESCE(EAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
			,EAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,EAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,EAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED
			,EAID.UNIT_PRICE
			,EAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
			,EAID.POSTED_FLAG
			,EAID.DESCRIPTION
			,EAID.AMOUNT
            ,EAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE
			, EAID.ATTRIBUTE6 
			, EAID.ATTRIBUTE3 
			, EAID.ATTRIBUTE5 
			, EAID.ATTRIBUTE4 
			, EAID.ATTRIBUTE8 
			, EAID.ATTRIBUTE7 
			,EAID.ACTION_CODE
			,CREATE_DATETIME 
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS EAID where  EAID.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY  INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1 
	)STEXAID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_VENDOR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE NVIDTT
	ON (NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD = STEXAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXAID.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION SMVID
	ON (SMVID.SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID 
     	AND SMVID.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE  NVI     
   ON(NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_ID
		AND NVI.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL
   ON (NVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_ID
        AND NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER
		AND NVIL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL EAILA
   ON (NVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT = EAILA.INVOICE_ID
       AND NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT =  EAILA.LINE_NUMBER
       AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=EAILA.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
	ON	(NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT=STEXAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
	ON( NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT=STEXAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
		 AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
  	ON( STEXAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT  BETWEEN  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOSDI.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY  ,NPO.PO_TYPE_CD, NPOSDI.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NPOSDI.SS_CD 
			FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPOSDI,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO 
			WHERE NPOSDI.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY =NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
			)NPOSD   
	ON(NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STEXAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
		AND NPOSD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_VID_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE NERL
	ON (NERL.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT=EAILA.REFERENCE_KEY1
  		AND NERL.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT=EAILA.REFERENCE_KEY2 
  		AND NERL.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UPPER(BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD) AS BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP
                  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE GROUP BY 1) NIUM
	     ON( BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP=STEXAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE )	
/* Removed as part of SJ Prod Retirement Q1FY14 */		 
/* UNION ALL
SELECT 
SMVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY   
,STEXAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER AS BK_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_NUM_INT   
,NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM         
,NVI.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY AS AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY           
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,STEXAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_ACCT_DT      
,NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_TRX_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN STEXAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED>99999999999.9999999  THEN 1
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) END AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INVOICED_QTY   
,COALESCE(STEXAID.UNIT_PRICE,0) AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_UNIT_PRC_AMT 
,COALESCE(STEXAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE,0) AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INV_VRC_AMT  
,NPOSD.PO_TYPE_CD AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_DOC_TYPE_CD  
,COALESCE(STEXAID.POSTED_FLAG,'=') AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_POSTED_FLG   
,STEXAID.DESCRIPTION AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_DESCR   
,COALESCE(STEXAID.AMOUNT,0)  AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
,'CASH_PAYMENT' AS EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT_TYPE_CD 
,NPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY       
,NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY  AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY         
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       
,COALESCE(NERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY ,-999) AS  EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY      
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,'FISCAL YEAR' AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
,STEXAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD                         
,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS DD_BK_COMPANY_CD              
,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD           
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE  AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD 
,STEXAID.ACTION_CODE     
, -999 AS VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY 
,COALESCE(NIUM.BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD
FROM 
   (
   	SELECT 
			 SMAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
			,SMAID.GLOBAL_NAME
			,SMAID.INVOICE_ID
			,SMAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
			,SMAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER
			,SMAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			,CAST(SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT
			,COALESCE(SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, -999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
			,SMAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,SMAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED
			,SMAID.UNIT_PRICE
			,SMAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
			,SMAID.POSTED_FLAG
			,SMAID.DESCRIPTION
			,SMAID.AMOUNT
                        ,SMAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE  
			,SMAID.ACTION_CODE
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL SMAID WHERE SMAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
			 EAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
			,EAID.GLOBAL_NAME
			,EAID.INVOICE_ID
			,EAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
			,EAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER			
			,EAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			,CAST(EAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT
			,COALESCE(EAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
			,EAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,EAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,EAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED
			,EAID.UNIT_PRICE
			,EAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
			,EAID.POSTED_FLAG
			,EAID.DESCRIPTION
			,EAID.AMOUNT
                        ,EAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE  
			,EAID.ACTION_CODE
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS EAID where  EAID.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	)STEXAID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_VENDOR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE NVIDTT
	ON (NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD = STEXAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXAID.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION SMVID
	ON (SMVID.SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID 
     	AND SMVID.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE  NVI     
   ON(NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_ID
		AND NVI.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
	ON	(NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT=STEXAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
	ON( NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT=STEXAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
		 AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
  	ON( STEXAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT  BETWEEN  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOSDI.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY  ,NPO.PO_TYPE_CD, NPOSDI.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NPOSDI.SS_CD 
			FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPOSDI,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO 
			WHERE NPOSDI.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY =NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
			)NPOSD   
	ON(NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STEXAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
		AND NPOSD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NER.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_NUM,NERLI.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT,NERLI.BK_SS_CD,
						NERLI.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,NER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY
				 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE NERLI,
					  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NER
				WHERE  NERLI.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY=NER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY
						AND NERLI.ER_LINE_CATEGORY_CD <>'ROUNDING'
						AND NER.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_NUM IS NOT NULL
      						AND NER.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N'
       						AND NERLI.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N'
							QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NER.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_NUM,NERLI.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT,NERLI.BK_SS_CD ORDER BY 
							NER.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_NUM,NERLI.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT,NERLI.BK_SS_CD )=1
				)NERL
	ON (NERL.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_NUM=NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM
  		AND NERL.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT=STEXAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER 
  		AND NERL.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UPPER(BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD) AS BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP
                  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE GROUP BY 1) NIUM
	     ON( BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP=STEXAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE )
		*/

select 
		EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
		cast( SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT as varchar(15) ) ,
		cast( SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT as varchar(15) ) , 
		NERL.BK_SS_CD
		from   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE NERL,
               $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NER
        where  (NERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY=NER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY
		AND COALESCE( NERL.ER_LINE_CATEGORY_CD,'UNK')  <>'ROUNDING'
		AND NER.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N'
		AND NERL.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N' 
               AND NERL.BK_SS_CD ='EMEA')

RETAINED_INVOICE_DIST_ID,
FINAL_RELEASE_ROUNDING,
FULLY_PAID_ACCTD_FLAG,

XINV_PARENT_REVERSAL_ID,
RECURRING_PAYMENT_ID,
RELEASE_INV_DIST_DERIVED_FROM,

GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
SRC_BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUT SCAID
WHERE SCAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
AND 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLDB.N_VENDOR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE NVIDTT
	WHERE NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD = SCAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     WHERE      NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCAID.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=SCAID.INVOICE_ID
    AND NVI.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
 WHERE    SCAID.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = SCAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
WHERE SCAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE BETWEEN  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT NPOSDI.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NPOSDI.SS_CD 
      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPOSDI,
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
      WHERE NPOSDI.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY =NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
     )NPOSD
   ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC   
WHERE   NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=SCAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
AND NPOSD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

UNION ALL

RETAINED_AMOUNT_REMAINING,
BC_EVENT_ID,
RETAINED_INVOICE_DIST_ID,
FINAL_RELEASE_ROUNDING,
FULLY_PAID_ACCTD_FLAG,
ROOT_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
XINV_PARENT_REVERSAL_ID,
RECURRING_PAYMENT_ID,
RELEASE_INV_DIST_DERIVED_FROM,
PAY_AWT_GROUP_ID,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
SRC_BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUT 
WHERE POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND  QUANTITY_INVOICED  > 99999999999.9999999

SELECT 
SMVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY   
,STEXAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER AS BK_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_NUM_INT   
,NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM         
,NVI.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY AS AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY           
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,STEXAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_ACCT_DT      
,NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_TRX_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN STEXAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED>99999999999.9999999  THEN 1
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) END AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INVOICED_QTY   
,COALESCE(STEXAID.UNIT_PRICE,0) AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_UNIT_PRC_AMT 
,COALESCE(STEXAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE,0) AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INV_VRC_AMT  
,NPOSD.PO_TYPE_CD AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_DOC_TYPE_CD  
,COALESCE(STEXAID.POSTED_FLAG,'=') AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_POSTED_FLG   
,STEXAID.DESCRIPTION AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_DESCR   
,COALESCE(STEXAID.AMOUNT,0)  AS VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
,'CASH_PAYMENT' AS EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT_TYPE_CD 
,NPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY       
,NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY  AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY         
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       
,COALESCE(NERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY ,-999) AS  EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY      
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            
,'FISCAL YEAR' AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD            
,STEXAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD                         
,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS DD_BK_COMPANY_CD              
,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD           
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE  AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD 
,STEXAID.ACTION_CODE     
,NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY 
,COALESCE(NIUM.BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD
FROM 
   (
   	SELECT 
			 SMAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
			,SMAID.GLOBAL_NAME
			,SMAID.INVOICE_ID
			,SMAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
			,SMAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER
			,SMAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			,CAST(SMAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT
			,COALESCE(SMAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, -999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
			,SMAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,SMAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,SMAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED
			,SMAID.UNIT_PRICE
			,SMAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
			,SMAID.POSTED_FLAG
			,SMAID.DESCRIPTION
			,SMAID.AMOUNT
                        ,SMAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE  
			,SMAID.ACTION_CODE
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUT SMAID WHERE SMAID.POSTED_FLAG='Y' AND GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
			 EAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID
			,EAID.GLOBAL_NAME
			,EAID.INVOICE_ID
			,EAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
			,EAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER			
			,EAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
			,CAST(EAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT
			,COALESCE(EAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
			,EAID.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
			,EAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
			,EAID.QUANTITY_INVOICED
			,EAID.UNIT_PRICE
			,EAID.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE
			,EAID.POSTED_FLAG
			,EAID.DESCRIPTION
			,EAID.AMOUNT
                        ,EAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE  
			,EAID.ACTION_CODE
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUT EAID where  EAID.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
	)STEXAID
	
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_VENDOR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE NVIDTT
	ON (NVIDTT.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD = STEXAID.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXAID.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION SMVID
	ON (SMVID.SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID 
     	AND SMVID.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE  NVI     
   ON(NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_ID
		AND NVI.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL
   ON (NVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_ID
        AND NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT=STEXAID.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER
		AND NVIL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL EAILA
   ON (NVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT = EAILA.INVOICE_ID
       AND NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT =  EAILA.LINE_NUMBER
       AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=EAILA.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
	ON	(NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT=STEXAID.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
	ON( NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT=STEXAID.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
		 AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
  	ON( STEXAID.ACCOUNTING_DATE_DT  BETWEEN  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOSDI.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY  ,NPO.PO_TYPE_CD, NPOSDI.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NPOSDI.SS_CD 
			FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPOSDI,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO 
			WHERE NPOSDI.DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY =NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
			)NPOSD   
	ON(NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STEXAID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_DD
		AND NPOSD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_VID_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE NERL
	ON (NERL.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT=EAILA.REFERENCE_KEY1
  		AND NERL.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT=EAILA.REFERENCE_KEY2 
  		AND NERL.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UPPER(BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD) AS BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP
                  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE GROUP BY 1) NIUM
	     ON( BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD_UP=STEXAID.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE )
